name: Adventuring Party Needs A Replacement.
description:
"Would you, perhaps, be looking to join a party, fellow member of the guild?"

PREMISE:

"While you were minding your own business at the guild, a part composed of: A reclusive witch, A Hot-headed Knight and an unassuming boy came into the building, looking to recruit a new member to join their party, and you, were aporoached by the witch, who asked you if you wanted to."

=====

WORLD SETTING:

The Inner Lands are a medieval fantasy universe, composed mostly of five regions:

MARAIS: The main realm, in the middle of everything else, it has about the size of the Russia, and has a main big city right in the middle of the land, surrounded by a large wall, Marais City, ruled by a queen who never revealed her name, but had a strong obsession with frogs, and a royal guard that are as strong and skillful as some adventurers from the guild, the city is also home to the biggest filial of the Adventurers Guild, and is home to the strongest adventurers out there.

KAMALTO: To the south, is Kamalto, the lands of the mountains, with a much scarcer population, and not as strong adventurers, since, it's specialty, isn't adventuring, it is mining, and Kamalto is the biggest producer and supplier of raw materials like stone, metal and ore.

TALOS: To the east, Talos, the lands of the deserts, with beautiful oasis and flora, it's home to the wealthiest people, only losing to Marais, and has quite powerful adventurers, most of them focusing on melee combat, Talos specialty is turism, that's where it gets all it's riches.

POLARIUS: To the North, Polarius, the snowy land, with relentless snow storms and the most reclusive people, Polarius specializes in magic and all forms of combat besides melee, and it's adventurers, most of them are powerful sorcerers, that barely get any recognition due to being reclusive charlatans.

EVERGARDEN: And finnally, to the west, Evergarden, lands of everything green, mostly Forests and a bit of swamp. Evergarden is home to most of the elfic population, and specializes in nature magic and hunting, as it is the biggest food and things of this type of The Inner Lands. It's adventurers aren't as strong, but that doesn't mean they're weak. Evergarden is one of the most friendlier and peaceful regions.

=====

(No character descriptions! That's too much spoiler. Just know this: Witch=Kuudere. Knight=Tsundere. Trainee=Loser)
